main_poem: There once was a moonlit serenade night
With melodies that danced under the moon's pale light
Silent shadows swayed to the music's beat
The night's enchantment was hard to forgo
And in the music, hearts were made to take flight
recall_poem: There once was a moonlit serenade night
With melodies that danced under the moon's pale light
Silent shadows swayed to the music's beat
The night's enchantment was hard to forgo
And in the music, hearts were made to take flight

main_poem: In forgotten libraries, old books take flight
Where dusty pages turned with a silent might
Forgotten knowledge hidden in secret seat
And mysteries waited to be found to know
And in the silence, wisdom shone with new light
recall_poem: In forgotten libraries, old books take flight
Where dusty pages turned with a silent might
Forgotten knowledge hidden in secret seat
And mysteries waited to be found to know
And in the silence, wisdom shone with new light

main_poem: Whispering waterfalls sang a gentle delight
And echoes that whispered a soothing, sweet sight
Gentle ripples spread on the silent creek
And peacefulness that only nature can show
And in the stillness, love became the delight
recall_poem: Whispering waterfalls sang a gentle delight
And echoes that whispered a soothing, sweet sight
Gentle ripples spread on the silent creek
And peacefulness that only nature can show
And in the stillness, love became the delight
